Generate EFA planning syntax

Source: R/model_layer.R
efa_syntax.Rd

Generate EFA planning syntax

Usage

efa_syntax(
  items,
  nfactors = 1L,
  extraction = c("minres", "pa", "ml"),
  rotation = c("oblimin", "promax", "varimax"),
  data_name = "data"
)

Arguments

items

Character vector of item IDs.

nfactors

Number of factors.

extraction

Extraction method.

rotation

Rotation method.

data_name

Name of the data object in generated R code.

Value

A character string with R syntax.

On this page

surveyframe is an open-source R package for survey research. MIT License.
